knowledge_atoms.text: Can I play with him now?
I see. Why is it jumping?
I'm looking at a bear. I'm dancing like a bear.
I'm looking at a tiger. I'm running like a tiger.
I'm looking at an elephant. I'm walking like an elephant.
I'm looking at the rabbits. I'm eating like a rabbit.
Learn the difference between possessive adjectives (my, your, his, her, its, our, their) and possessive pronouns (mine, yours, his, hers, its, ours, theirs).
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 学习形容词性物主代词和名词性物主代词的区别。
学习结尾辅音丛'-ng' /ŋ/的发音。
学习结尾辅音丛'-nk' /ŋk/的发音。

knowledge_atoms.text: Listen again and choose the right answers.
Listen and tick. Where is the dog?
Listen and tick. Which is John's picture?
No. They're playing with each other.
Oh, it's mine. He's sleeping. He's very tired.
Practice forming sentences in the present continuous tense.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 练习用现在进行时造句。

knowledge_atoms.text: Practice using the present continuous tense to ask and answer about actions.
knowledge_atoms.gloss: 练习使用现在进行时来问答正在进行的动作。

knowledge_atoms.text: Robin, do you want to swim like a fish?
The yellow picture is mine. Are these all ours?

knowledge_atoms.gloss: 使用物主代词（mine, its, theirs）。
使用物主代词（mine, yours, his）。

knowledge_atoms.text: What are you doing here, Robin?
Whose tail is that? It's running so fast. Is it the tiger's?
Why are they looking at us?
Wow! That picture of Beijing is beautiful. Whose is it?
Wow! What a beautiful painting! Is it yours?
Yes! It's your dog. The dog is yours.
Yes. Can you take him to the park?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Whose dog is it?. 单元首页图。在公园里，迈克和陈洁讨论一只狗的主人。同时，小动物们也在讨论一幅画的主人。两个场景都围绕询问物品归属的主题展开。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word whose?
Can you say: Whose dog is this?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Whose dog is it?. 约翰和吴彬彬在草地上看到一只兔子。他们讨论了这只兔子的归属、行为，以及旁边胡萝卜的归属。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word rabbit?
Can you say: Whose carrots are these?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Possession. 陈洁和迈克正在看一些照片。他们讨论了这些照片的归属，提到了北京、上海等地的风景。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word mine?
Can you say: Are these all ours?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Possessive Adjectives and Pronouns. 通过一个“狗狗秀”的公告板，展示了不同物主代词和形容词性物主代词的对应关系。
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Learn the difference between possessive adjectives (my, your, his, her, its, our, their) and possessive pronouns (mine, yours, his, hers, its, ours, theirs).

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Phonics: -ng / -nk. 根据单词结尾的发音，将词库中的单词分类填写到'-ng'和'-nk'两个组别中。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word trunk?
Can you say: Read, write and listen.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Describing locations and actions. 山姆在陈洁家，他正在询问小狗菲多的位置和正在做的事情，并希望能和它玩耍。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word kitchen?
Can you say: Where is Fido now?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Present Continuous Tense. 通过图卡展示了动物的各种动作，学习现在分词形式，并结合公园场景的对话进行练习。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word climbing?
Can you say: Are these rabbits eating?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: At the Zoo. 莎拉和机器人在动物园。机器人罗宾兴奋地模仿各种动物的动作，如熊跳舞、兔子吃东西、老虎跑、大象走、猴子爬，还想学鸟飞翔。但当莎拉问它是否想像鱼一样游泳时，它表示拒绝。
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: What are you doing here, Robin?

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Unit 5 Check & Wrap-up. 听录音，根据听到的内容为四幅图片排序。
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and number.

page_lessons.page_intro_cn: Theme: Story time. 一个连环画故事。小熊zoom和小松鼠zip在野外观察动物。他们先是看到了老虎，但被小熊zoom的喷嚏吓跑了。接着他们又发现了两只猴子，并开始给它们拍照。有趣的是，猴子们也在模仿他们，给他们“拍照”。
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word tiger?
Can you say: Whose tail is that?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 单元首页图。在公园里，迈克和陈洁讨论一只狗的主人。同时，小动物们也在讨论一幅画的主人。两个场景都围绕询问物品归属的主题展开。 Key patterns: Whose dog is this?; Is it yours?
core_patterns: Wow! What a beautiful painting! Is it yours?
Oh, it's mine. He's sleeping. He's very tired.
allowed_answer_scope: Oh, it's mine. He's sleeping. He's very tired.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word whose?
Can you say: Whose dog is this?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 约翰和吴彬彬在草地上看到一只兔子。他们讨论了这只兔子的归属、行为，以及旁边胡萝卜的归属。 Key patterns: Whose carrots are these?; The carrots are theirs.
core_patterns: I see. Why is it jumping?
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word rabbit?
Can you say: Whose carrots are these?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 听一段对话，根据内容判断哪一张是约翰的图片，并勾选。 Key patterns: Listen and tick. Which is John's picture?
core_patterns: Listen and tick. Which is John's picture?
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and tick. Which is John's picture?
return_anchors: Listen and tick. Which is John's picture?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 陈洁和迈克正在看一些照片。他们讨论了这些照片的归属，提到了北京、上海等地的风景。 Key patterns: Are these all ours?; Whose is it?
core_patterns: The yellow picture is mine. Are these all ours?
Wow! That picture of Beijing is beautiful. Whose is it?
allowed_answer_scope: Look! There is a picture of Shanghai, too.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word mine?
Can you say: Are these all ours?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 在教室场景中，学生们练习询问桌上书本的归属。 Key patterns: Whose storybooks are these?; Whose book is this?
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Whose storybooks are these?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the grammar point activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 通过一个“狗狗秀”的公告板，展示了不同物主代词和形容词性物主代词的对应关系。 Key patterns: Learn the difference between possessive adjectives (my, your, his, her, its, our, their) and possessive pronouns (mine, yours, his, hers, its, ours, theirs).; Look! That's my dog!
core_patterns: Learn the difference between possessive adjectives (my, your, his, her, its, our, their) and possessive pronouns (mine, yours, his, hers, its, ours, theirs).
Yes! It's your dog. The dog is yours.
allowed_answer_scope: Yes! It's your dog. The dog is yours.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Learn the difference between possessive adjectives (my, your, his, her, its, our, their) and possessive pronouns (mine, yours, his, hers, its, ours, theirs).
return_anchors: Learn the difference between possessive adjectives (my, your, his, her, its, our, their) and possessive pronouns (mine, yours, his, hers, its, ours, theirs).
Yes! It's your dog. The dog is yours.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice write activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个表格填空练习，要求学生根据表格第一列的“物主”，分别使用形容词性物主代词和名词性物主代词完成两个句子。 Key patterns: Whose book is that?; It's Amy's book.
allowed_answer_scope: It's her book. / The book is hers.
It's his book. / The book is his.
It's their book. / The book is theirs.
It's my book. / The book is mine.
It's our book. / The book is ours.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Whose book is that?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Notice and repeat the target pronunciation pattern.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 学习鼻音辅音丛 '-ng' /ŋ/ 和 '-nk' /ŋk/ 在单词结尾的发音。 Key patterns: Learn the final consonant blend '-ng' /ŋ/.; Learn the final consonant blend '-nk' /ŋk/.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word long?
Can you say: Learn the final consonant blend '-ng' /ŋ/.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Retell the reading content by filling in key blanks.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 根据单词结尾的发音，将词库中的单词分类填写到'-ng'和'-nk'两个组别中。 Key patterns: Read, write and listen.
allowed_answer_scope: song, ring, sing, thing, morning, long
trunk, think, drink, pink, thank, bank
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word trunk?
Can you say: Read, write and listen.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice write activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 看图，听录音，并根据括号中的动词提示，使用现在进行时态完成句子。 Key patterns: Practice the present continuous tense.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Practice the present continuous tense.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 听一段对话，根据内容判断小狗在哪里，并勾选正确的图片。 Key patterns: Listen and tick. Where is the dog?
core_patterns: Listen and tick. Where is the dog?
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and tick. Where is the dog?
return_anchors: Listen and tick. Where is the dog?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Understand and say the core dialogue pattern on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 山姆在陈洁家，他正在询问小狗菲多的位置和正在做的事情，并希望能和它玩耍。 Key patterns: Where is Fido now?; Is he drinking water?
core_patterns: Can I play with him now?
Yes. Can you take him to the park?
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word kitchen?
Can you say: Where is Fido now?
return_anchors: Can I play with him now?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Use the page dialogue pattern in short guided practice.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 看几张关于小狗的照片，练习用现在进行时提问和回答，描述小狗正在做的事情。 Key patterns: Practice using the present continuous tense to ask and answer about actions.; Is the dog eating?
core_patterns: Practice using the present continuous tense to ask and answer about actions.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Practice using the present continuous tense to ask and answer about actions.
return_anchors: Practice using the present continuous tense to ask and answer about actions.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Recognize and say the core vocabulary on the page.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 通过图卡展示了动物的各种动作，学习现在分词形式，并结合公园场景的对话进行练习。 Key patterns: Are these rabbits eating?; Oh, Fido is sleeping.
core_patterns: No. They're playing with each other.
allowed_answer_scope: No. They're playing with each other.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word climbing?
Can you say: Are these rabbits eating?

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Transfer the page language into a new speaking task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个句子接龙游戏。学生从三组词库（人名、动作、地点）中各选一个词，组成一个完整的句子，并轮流说出来。 Key patterns: Practice forming sentences in the present continuous tense.; Mike is sleeping.
core_patterns: Practice forming sentences in the present continuous tense.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word Mike?
Can you say: Practice forming sentences in the present continuous tense.
return_anchors: Practice forming sentences in the present continuous tense.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and understand the key information in the passage.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 莎拉和机器人在动物园。机器人罗宾兴奋地模仿各种动物的动作，如熊跳舞、兔子吃东西、老虎跑、大象走、猴子爬，还想学鸟飞翔。但当莎拉问它是否想像鱼一样游泳时，它表示拒绝。 Key patterns: What are you doing here, Robin?; Robin, do you want to swim like a fish?
core_patterns: What are you doing here, Robin?
Robin, do you want to swim like a fish?
I'm looking at a bear. I'm dancing like a bear.
I'm looking at the rabbits. I'm eating like a rabbit.
I'm looking at a tiger. I'm running like a tiger.
I'm looking at an elephant. I'm walking like an elephant.
allowed_answer_scope: I'm looking at a bear. I'm dancing like a bear.
I'm looking at the rabbits. I'm eating like a rabbit.
I'm looking at a tiger. I'm running like a tiger.
I'm looking at an elephant. I'm walking like an elephant.
I'm looking at a monkey. I'm climbing like him.
I'm looking at a bird. I like flying. I want to be a bird!
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: What are you doing here, Robin?
return_anchors: What are you doing here, Robin?
Robin, do you want to swim like a fish?
I'm looking at a bear. I'm dancing like a bear.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Work on the practice write activity.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 根据上面的阅读内容，回答问题。 Key patterns: Answer the questions.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Answer the questions.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 听录音，根据听到的内容为四幅图片排序。 Key patterns: Listen and number.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen and number.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Catch the key information from the listening task.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 再次听录音，并根据听到的内容选择问题的正确答案。 Key patterns: Listen again and choose the right answers.
core_patterns: Listen again and choose the right answers.
entry_probe_questions: Can you say: Listen again and choose the right answers.
branchable_topics: Listen again and choose the right answers.
return_anchors: Listen again and choose the right answers.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Retell the reading content by filling in key blanks.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 总结和巩固形容词性物主代词和名词性物主代词的用法。学生需要根据对话上下文，从给定的词库中选择正确的物主代词填空。 Key patterns: Complete the sentences.
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word his?
Can you say: Complete the sentences.

teaching_blocks.teaching_goal: Read and understand the key information in the passage.
teaching_blocks.teaching_summary: 一个连环画故事。小熊zoom和小松鼠zip在野外观察动物。他们先是看到了老虎，但被小熊zoom的喷嚏吓跑了。接着他们又发现了两只猴子，并开始给它们拍照。有趣的是，猴子们也在模仿他们，给他们“拍照”。 Key patterns: Whose tail is that?; What are they doing?
core_patterns: Why are they looking at us?
Whose tail is that? It's running so fast. Is it the tiger's?
entry_probe_questions: Do you know the word tiger?
Can you say: Whose tail is that?
return_anchors: Why are they looking at us?
